**💡 Feature Description**
A clear and concise description of what you want to add to the project.

**❓ What problem does this solve**
Why do we need this? What is currently frustrating or missing?

**🛠️ Proposed Solution / Ideas (Optional)
Any thoughts on how this should work or look (e.g., brief logic, examples).
